vitest_unit.evidence: Test Files: 1 passed (1), Tests: 10 passed (10), Duration: 130ms

cases.name: 主题 - light 模式
cases.evidence: grep -En '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}' across all 3 compact components → 0 matches. grep -c 'var(--' → 37 references total. All colors via CSS vars: var(--accent), var(--border), var(--bg), var(--surface), var(--fg), var(--muted), var(--success), var(--danger). Only non-var: rgba(255,255,255,0.3) in AgentRunBlock.vue:186 sweep gradient overlay (theme-independent translucent). color-mix(in oklch, ...) used for chip/badge backgrounds.

cases.name: 主题 - dark 模式
cases.evidence: Same grep evidence as TC-16: 0 hex colors, 37 CSS var references. settings.ts applyTheme() sets data-theme on documentElement → CSS var cascade. No component-level color overrides. rgba(255,255,255,0.3) sweep valid on dark accent backgrounds. color-mix() with oklch is theme-agnostic.

cases.name: 旧消息兼容 - 无 contentBlocks
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-18 — 2 tests passed. Test 1: legacy message with thinking+toolCalls+content but no contentBlocks → groupIntoSections(msg, undefined) → msg.contentBlocks?.length is falsy → groupByLegacyFields(msg) → returns ['thinking','toolCall','text']. Test 2: legacy message with only content → returns ['text'].

cases.name: compactStreaming=false 不受影响
cases.evidence: vitest: TC-19 — 2 tests passed. Test 1: standaloneTools=undefined → groupByContentBlocksLegacy merges adjacent same-type blocks → ['thinking','toolCall']. Test 2: empty Set → all built-in tools merge into MergeBlock. Code review: AssistantContent.vue line 8: v-if='useCompact', line 93: useCompact = computed(() => settingsStore.compactStreaming). When false, v-else renders normal section, AgentRunBlock never instantiated. message-layout.ts line 72-74: standaloneTools undefined → groupByContentBlocksLegacy path.

cases.name: Settings - standaloneTools checkbox 默认值
cases.evidence: vitest: ALL_PI_TOOLS constant test — exactly 7 tools ['read','bash','edit','write','grep','find','ls'] confirmed. SystemPane.vue line 133: <template v-if='settingsStore.compactStreaming'> wraps standalone section. Line 141: <label v-for='tool in ALL_PI_TOOLS'> renders 7 checkboxes. Line 142-144: <Toggle :checked='settingsStore.standaloneTools.includes(tool)'>. settings.ts line 19: standaloneTools = ref<string[]>(['write', 'edit']). Result: 7 checkboxes rendered, write+edit checked by default.

cases.name: Settings - 修改立即生效
cases.evidence: Reactivity chain verified: (1) SystemPane.vue lines 70-78: toggleStandaloneTool mutates settingsStore.standaloneTools (reactive ref). (2) AgentRunBlock.vue line 86: standaloneToolsSet = computed(() => new Set(settingsStore.standaloneTools)). (3) Line 96: rawSections = computed(() => groupIntoSections(props.message, standaloneToolsSet.value)). TC-15 vitest proved grouping changes with standaloneTools: adding 'bash' moves it from MergeBlock to StandaloneBlock. Vue reactivity propagates immediately without page reload.

cases.name: Settings - 持久化
cases.evidence: settings.ts persist config (line 60): { key: 'xyz-settings', pick: ['theme','themePreset','locale','defaultModel','autoExpandThinking','autoExpandToolCalls','compactStreaming','standaloneTools'] }. 'standaloneTools' and 'compactStreaming' explicitly in pick array. Pinia persist plugin serializes to localStorage on mutation, deserializes on store init. Restart → store init → localStorage read → settings restored.

notes: Non-core scope: TC-16 to TC-22 (AC-6 theme, AC-7 backward compat, AC-8 Settings).
TC-16/17 (theme): exhaustive grep confirmed 0 hardcoded hex colors in 3 components. 37 CSS var references. Only rgba(255,255,255,0.3) in sweep gradient is translucent overlay.
TC-18/19 (compat): vitest verified 4 tests (2 for TC-18, 2 for TC-19) + code review of branching in message-layout.ts lines 70-77 and conditional rendering in AssistantContent.vue.

TC-20/21/22 (Settings): code review confirmed 7-tool checkbox list, write+edit default, Pinia persist with standaloneTools in pick array, full reactivity chain from Toggle → settingsStore → computed → groupIntoSections.
All 3 build gates pass: vitest=10/10 pass in 130ms, vue-tsc=0 errors, vite build=success in 1.81s.
